summary: Tested worker photo upload feature. All backend tests (10/10) passed and frontend UI tests confirmed working. Photo upload uses Emergent Object Storage fallback (Cloudinary not configured in preview).

issues: Missing DialogDescription causing React warning: 'Missing Description or aria-describedby={undefined} for {DialogContent}'

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/auth/business/login - login returns token and business - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/businesses/my/workers - returns workers with photo_url field - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/businesses/my/workers - existing worker has photo_url - PASSED
Backend: POST /api/businesses/my/workers - create new worker (photo_url initially null) - PASSED
Backend: POST /api/businesses/my/workers/{worker_id}/photo - upload photo returns secure_url and public_id - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/businesses/my/workers - photo_url persisted after upload - PASSED
Backend: POST /api/businesses/my/workers/{worker_id}/photo - invalid file returns 400 - PASSED
Backend: POST /api/businesses/my/workers/{worker_id}/photo - without auth returns 401 - PASSED
Backend: POST /api/businesses/my/workers/{worker_id}/photo - nonexistent worker returns 404 - PASSED
Frontend: /business/team - page loads with worker cards - PASSED
Frontend: /business/team - worker card shows photo when photo_url exists - PASSED
Frontend: /business/team - 'Añadir trabajador' button opens dialog with circular photo upload area - PASSED
Frontend: /business/team - photo upload area has data-testid='worker-photo-upload' - PASSED
Frontend: /business/team - file input has data-testid='worker-photo-file-input' - PASSED
Frontend: /business/team - edit worker dialog shows existing photo - PASSED
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: Dialog components missing DialogDescription causing React accessibility warnings. Consider adding aria-describedby to DialogContent in TeamSchedulePage.jsx

mocked_api_note.Cloudinary: NOT configured in preview env - uses Emergent Object Storage fallback (expected)

seed_data_creation: Used existing worker 'Test Worker Duration' (e8156189-9cc2-4b3d-9f0e-2df518915bda) with photo. Test workers created during testing were cleaned up.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Worker photo upload feature fully implemented. Backend endpoint POST /api/businesses/my/workers/{worker_id}/photo uploads photo and returns {secure_url, public_id}. Frontend has circular photo upload area (data-testid='worker-photo-upload') in create/edit worker dialog. Worker cards show photos when photo_url exists. Photo storage uses Emergent Object Storage fallback since Cloudinary is not configured.
